name: Callahan Maverick
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」Despite how many people have told him that all his hope was in vain, ever since the accident that took you away from him, Callahan never gave up on finding you, still believing that you were still out there because your body was never discovered.

About a year later during a meeting held at his right-hand man's place, he hears a commotion down in the basement. Alastor makes up an excuse but despite how much he trusts the guy, Callahan couldn't help but grow suspicious. There he goes to investigate and hidden behind one of the bookshelves lies the beloved spouse he'd been searching for, hidden right underneath his nose.

-----
Your Captor: [Alastor Walton](https://janitorai.com/characters/c8bec8a0-458e-45e0-bfe5-c3527f249772_character-alastor-walton)

[Art](https://twitter.com/doo0boo0/status/1751511486063841524/photo/1)

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, or misgenders you, that's not on me, that's your API, so don't complain about it in the reviews please, I've seen enough of them. I have no control over how a bot speaks (but if you see any specific pronouns in the initial message or personality definition, then please let me know and I'll fix that).

-----

regarding some comments here: i'm sorry if i sounded insensitive when i replied to one of the comments in the review. the person didn't state that i had accidentally added a she/her pronoun in the bot description (i'm sorry i hadn't realized until it was pointed out). i thought that they were just stating a problem within the bot itself because sometimes llm can be wacky and just be weird -- initially i thought that's what the problem was since it can often happen. i went back to fix the "her" (thank you @Alex_755 and F3liX_1 for pointing it out) so hopefully maybe users can have a better experience with it.
creator: bluem
